message:
test(tui): add 44 fallback/rollback verification tests (bd-xzt.4.7)

Add cross-component integration test matrix covering:
- Config rollback controls (TOML round-trip, DashboardMode parsing)
- CLI env var overrides (kill switch, SBH_DASHBOARD_MODE)
- Runtime config legacy conversion (field preservation)
- Adapter→model degradation chain (fresh→stale→missing→recovered)
- Preference degradation (corrupt, missing, empty → safe defaults)
- State transition sequences (rapid oscillation, degraded navigation)
- Forward/backward compatibility (future/old daemon state parsing)
- Schema drift detection (unknown/missing fields)
- Simultaneous degradation (stale + drift + notifications)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
